3: ## Overview

12: - **Purpose**: Build anticipation for upcoming content
13: - **Student Experience**: 
14:   - "Soon" badge appears on Course/Lesson card
15:   - Content is locked - clicking shows message "This content is being prepared and will be available soon"
16: - **Visuals**: Neutral/secondary color (Gray or Light Blue)
17: 
18: #### 1.2 "Just Added" (חדש) Tag
19: - **Purpose**: Draw attention to fresh material
20: - **Student Experience**:
21:   - "Just Added" or "New" badge appears on Course/Lesson card
22:   - Fully accessible - no access restrictions
23: - **Visuals**: High-energy color (Bright Green or Yellow)
24: 
25: ### 2. Admin Configuration
26: 
27: #### 2.1 Fields in Course/Lesson Edit View
28: - **Status Selector**: Dropdown or Radio with options:
29:   - None (Default)
30:   - Soon
31:   - Just Added
32: - **Visibility Toggle**: Hide "Soon" content from students before ready to show
33: - **(Optional) New Until Date**: Auto-expire "Just Added" badge after set date
34: 
35: ### 3. Design Guidelines
36: 
37: #### 3.1 Badge Styling
38: - Shape: Pill-shaped with rounded corners (`rounded-full`)
39: - Font: Assistant Bold, `text-xs` size
40: - Placement:
41:   - Course Grid: Top right or top left corner of course card
42:   - Lesson List: Next to lesson title or progress circle
43: 
44: #### 3.2 Animations
45: - "Just Added" badges: Subtle pulse animation to draw attention
46: 
47: ## Acceptance Criteria
48: 
49: 1. Admins can mark a lesson as "Soon" in Payload CMS admin panel
50: 2. Students cannot access "Soon" content - clicking shows locked message
51: 3. "Just Added" badge appears immediately on homepage/course list when enabled
52: 4. Badges adapt to responsive design (mobile/desktop) without overlapping course title
53: 5. "Soon" badge uses neutral color (Gray/Light Blue)
54: 6. "Just Added" badge uses bright color (Green/Yellow)
55: 7. Badge uses Assistant Bold font at text-xs size
56: 8. "Just Added" badge has subtle pulse animation
57: 9. Optional: "New Until" date field auto-removes "Just Added" badge after expiry
58: 
59: ## Technical Notes
60: 
61: - Add fields to both Courses and Lessons collections
62: - Implement access control hook for "Soon" content locking
63: - Extend existing CourseCard and LessonItem components
64: - Use Tailwind CSS for all styling (project standard)

91:      - For "justAdded" and "none": allow based on existing logic

import type { Field } from 'payload'

/**
 * Content Status constants for courses and lessons.
 *
 * Used to display visual badges to students:
 * - "Soon": Upcoming content, locked from student access
 * - "Just Added": New content, fully accessible with visual highlight
 */
export const CONTENT_STATUS_OPTIONS = ['none', 'soon', 'justAdded'] as const
export type ContentStatus = (typeof CONTENT_STATUS_OPTIONS)[number]
export const DEFAULT_CONTENT_STATUS: ContentStatus = 'none'

/**
 * Reusable content status fields for courses and lessons.
 *
 * Fields:
 * - contentStatus: Select field for badge type (none/soon/justAdded)
 * - contentStatusVisible: Controls visibility for "Soon" content
 * - contentStatusExpiresAt: Optional expiry date for "Just Added" badge
